keys.mouseAim: Aim — your character auto-faces the nearest enemy
keys.lmbCharge: Charge attack (Charge enchant) — or deploy a drone (Engineer)

hud.topRight: Score · Time survived · Current wave · Kill count
hud.bottomLeft: Your HP bar, weapon type & stats
hud.bottomRight: Item slots (6 max) with cooldown bars
hud.topBar: Wave timer — fills up as time passes
hud.bottomCenter: Drone status bar (Engineer only) — shows each drone's state and HP

controls.tip: Attacks fire automatically — just stay in range of enemies.

classes.intro: Choose your class at the start of every run. Each class has a different playstyle and starting conditions.

brawler.name: Brawler ⚔️
brawler.desc: Starts with a melee weapon pick. Fights at close range — high risk, high reward. Pairs best with cooldown and damage augments to chain kills quickly.
brawler.tip: Stay mobile. Melee weapons have small arcs, so positioning matters more than for rangers.

ranger.name: Ranger 🔫
ranger.desc: Starts with a ranged weapon pick. Easiest class to learn — you can deal damage while retreating. Pairs well with bullet speed, range, and AoE enchants.
ranger.tip: Kite in wide circles. Shooters will try to orbit you at mid range — keep moving to break their rhythm.

engineer.name: Engineer 🤖
engineer.desc: Has no personal weapon — four drones fight for you. Two are ranged, two are melee. Survives by managing drone placement, repairs, and wave resets.
droneRows: Deploy orbiting drone to cursor position
Recall nearest deployed drone — or recover a nearby wrecked drone
Field-repair a wrecked drone (2.5s) or heal a damaged deployed drone (8 hp/s)
states: Escorts you. Attacks enemies that come close but at reduced power (35% damage, 55% range, 1.8× cooldown). Heals passively at 4 hp/s. Deploy it to unlock full stats.
Stationary turret. Full weapon stats. Field-repairable by standing next to it.
Destroyed in place. Stand within repair radius to restore it over 2.5s. Progress resets slowly if you walk away.
Flying back to you after being recalled or repaired. Becomes orbiting on arrival.
engineer.waveClear: When a wave ends, all deployed drones recall home automatically and all drone HP is restored to full. Use this to regroup before the next wave.
engineer.tip: Orbit is a safety net, not a strategy. Deployed drones deal 3× more damage than orbiting ones — commit them early and repair between waves.

runner.name: Runner
runner.desc: Rushes directly at you. Low HP but high speed — dangerous in groups. Appears every wave from wave 1.

brute.name: Brute
brute.desc: Slow melee fighter with high HP and massive damage per swing. Appears from wave 4.

shooter.name: Shooter
shooter.desc: Maintains distance and fires projectiles. Tries to orbit you at ideal range. Appears from wave 5.

boss.name: Boss
boss.desc: Giant enemy with a long-range laser beam. Appears every 10 waves alongside a pack of Runners. Killing it grants a Boss Reward choice screen.

weapons.tip: Enchants are unlocked at wave 20 and offered as a special reward. You can only have one enchant at a time.

ranged.single: Standard single bullet. Reliable baseline — solid damage, decent range.
ranged.rifle: Fires a burst of bullets in quick succession. Great sustained DPS against tanky enemies.
ranged.pierce: Bullet travels through multiple enemies. Devastating against tight Runner packs.
ranged.aoe: Bullet explodes on impact. Damages all enemies in a radius — great for crowd control.
ranged.chain: Bullet bounces to nearby enemies after each hit. Excellent in dense waves.
ranged.laser: Charges briefly then fires an instant-hit beam. Massive damage, wide width. Hold position during charge.
ranged.smg: Very fast fire rate with bullet spread. Shreds anything that gets close, lower per-bullet damage.

melee.single: Standard melee swing with a 90° arc. Simple and effective at close range.
melee.sweetspot: Deals 75% more damage to enemies at the edge of range, 75% less to enemies too close.
melee.momentum: Each kill adds a stack that increases damage and reduces cooldown. Resets on taking damage or after 1.5s without a kill.
melee.charge: Hold LMB to charge — damage and range scale with charge time. Massive burst potential.
melee.lifesteal: Each hit heals you for a percentage of damage dealt. Makes staying in melee range safer.
melee.detonator: Enemies you kill explode, dealing AoE damage to nearby foes. Devastating in dense packs — each kill can chain into the next.

augments.howDesc: After each wave you choose 1 of 3 random augments. Each has a rarity that determines the bonus magnitude — higher rarity = bigger % boost. Boss reward screens always offer at least Rare quality. You get 2 rerolls per run.
augments.tip: All bonuses are multiplicative — stacking the same stat compounds over time. A 15% Damage boost on top of existing upgrades is always 15% of your current value.

legendary.name: Legendary
legendary.desc: Massive multipliers. Run-defining if you find one.

maxHp: Increases your maximum health. Also keeps current HP ratio.
moveSpeed: Increases your movement speed. Very strong — mobility is survival.
cooldown: Reduces time between attacks. Negative % = faster attacks.
chainRadius: How far chain lightning jumps (Chain enchant).
lifesteal: HP stolen per hit as a percentage (Lifesteal enchant).
damagePerStack: Percentage damage increase per stack (Momentum enchant).
cooldownPerStack: Percentage cooldown reduction per stack (Momentum enchant).

errors.fillAllFields: Please fill in all password fields.

accountDelete.title: Delete Account
accountDelete.warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your stats, friends, and game history will be lost.
accountDelete.confirmLabel: Please type your username {{username}} to confirm:

friends.noFriends: You haven't added any friends yet.
